prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名持续上升：2021年第81名→2022年第80名→2023年第77名→2024年第76名→2025年第74名→2026年第72名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力持续增强；该校在2021-2026年声誉评价文件中未出现负面或异常信号，声誉平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第96位（评价为一般），综合热度约16.3万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；历史投档异常记录中无东华大学断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，材料科学与工程获评A等级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；该学科与招生专业中的材料类（含高分子材料与工程、无机非金属材料工程、复合材料与工程）直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024-2026年持续高热推荐，东华大学物理类招生涵盖计算机类、人工智能、电子信息类、智能制造工程等热门专业，对考生吸引力较强；安徽省2026年高考总报名人数约45.1万人，按2025年物理类占比估算约31.3万人，较2025年（32.1万）略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；东华大学位于上海市，对安徽省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在安徽省招生人数占其全国总招生比例约2.8%（2025年数据），属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+2.36%）、软科排名持续上升、上海地域优势及热门工科专业吸引力等因素，在2025年基准17337名基础上，预计2026年竞争略有加剧（位次数字略减小）；预测最低位次约17533名，区间17033–18033名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science Category from 2021 to 2023) were approximately 10946 → 13697 → 18125 → 18525 → 17337, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6400 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17337, an increase of about 1188 places compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province: 111 in 2021 → 113 in 2022 → 115 in 2023 → 127 in 2024 → 127 in 2025 → 130 in 2026, with an increase of 3 students (+2.36%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been steadily rising: 81st in 2021 → 80th in 2022 → 77th in 2023 → 76th in 2024 → 74th in 2025 → 72nd in 2026, reflecting continuous enhancement of comprehensive strength; no negative or abnormal signals appeared in the university's reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, indicating stable reputation; the university's overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 96th (rated as average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 163,000, indicating a moderate to low level of attention on short video platforms, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; there are no records of enrollment gaps for Donghua University in historical admission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at the university; this discipline directly corresponds to the Materials category (including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering) in the admission majors, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026; Donghua University's Physics Category admissions include popular majors like Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, which are attractive to candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is about 451,000, estimated at about 313,000 for Physics Category based on the 2025 proportion, a slight decrease from 2025 (321,000), slightly easing competitive pressure; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from Anhui Province; the university's enrollment in Anhui Province accounts for about 2.8% of its total national enrollment (2025 data), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2.36%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the regional advantage of Shanghai, and the appeal of popular engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 17337, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026 (ranking number slightly decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 17533, with a range of 17033–18033.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17033–18033, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as targets for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17000) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 18000) should mainly target Tier 2 majors, while also considering Tier 3 majors with disciplinary advantages, such as Materials (A-level discipline).

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts from 2021-2023) were approximately 1772 → 1666 → 17557 → 2983 → 2567; the 2023 ranking anomaly (17557) was due to a significant drop in the Anhui provincial liberal arts control line; excluding the anomaly, the recent three-year rankings are approximately 1666 → 2983 → 2567, showing an overall backward trend; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 2567, an increase of about 416 places compared to 2024; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Anhui: 2021: 20 → 2022: 18 → 2023: 19 → 2024: 13 → 2025: 15 → 2026: 14, with a reduction of 1 student (-6.67%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a small but clear reduction that slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has steadily risen to 72nd in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in overall strength; no negative or abnormal signals appeared in the university's reputation evaluation documents from 2021-2026, indicating stable reputation; the university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 96th (rated as average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 163,000, indicating moderate to low attention; there are no records of Donghua University experiencing a cutoff anomaly in historical admission files; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A grade, the only A- or above discipline at the university; although this discipline is not directly related to liberal arts majors, it supports the overall academic reputation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-6.67%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the Shanghai location advantage, and the popularity of liberal arts majors like Law, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026 (ranking number decreases) based on the 2025 baseline of 2567; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2434, with a range of 1934–2934.
